mapper.select: SELECT staff_id, first_name, last_name, address_id, email, store_id, active, username, password, last_update, picture FROM staff ORDER BY first_name, last_name
SELECT staff_id, first_name, last_name, address_id, email, store_id, active, username, password, last_update, picture FROM staff WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff (first_name, last_name, address_id, email, store_id, active, username, password, last_update, picture) VALUES (#{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{addressId}, #{email}, #{storeId}, #{active}, #{username}, #{password}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now()), #{picture, jdbcType=BLOB}) RETURNING staff_id
mapper.update: UPDATE staff SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, address_id = #{addressId}, email = #{email}, store_id = #{storeId}, active = #{active}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, last_update = now(), picture = #{picture, jdbcType=BLOB} WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
